symptom_vector: pod killed with process termination and cessation of network activity

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: recommendationservice 因 pod_processes 降为零导致 pod 被强制终止
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 从 Trace 数据观察到 frontend 服务的请求比例异常，暗示下游服务 recommendationservice 可能故障
Step 2: 分析 Metric 数据发现 recommendationservice 的 pod_network_receive_packets 和 pod_network_transmit_packets 指标从正常值降为零，表明网络活动停止
Step 3: 检查 pod_processes 指标，对于受影响 pod 如 redis-cart-0 降为零，结合 pod_memory_working_set_bytes 降为零的模式，确认 pod 被杀死

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request proportion anomalies in frontend service calls
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 Trace 数据中 frontend 服务的请求比例是否异常，特别是调用 recommendationservice 的链路

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden drop to zero or abnormal fluctuations
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 的 request 指标是否骤降或异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden drop to zero or abnormal fluctuations
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 的 response 指标是否骤降或异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drop to zero indicating memory release
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice pod 的 pod_memory_working_set_bytes 是否降为零

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drop to zero indicating no inbound traffic
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice pod 的 pod_network_receive_bytes 是否降为零

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drop to zero indicating no inbound packets
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice pod 的 pod_network_receive_packets 是否降为零

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drop to zero indicating no outbound traffic
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice pod 的 pod_network_transmit_bytes 是否降为零

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drop to zero indicating no outbound packets
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice pod 的 pod_network_transmit_packets 是否降为零
